results.title: Law firms cheated in filing claims with NFL’s $1 billion concussion settlement fund, report says
results.description: Five law firms representing 98 NFL players have been accused of scheming to defraud the NFL's concussion settlement fund

results.title: Artists bail on Trump's Great American State Fair. Califoirnia won't
results.description: The exodus of musical acts from Trump's Great American State Fair hasn't spread to states. California still plans to put on a pavilion.
